message:
fix(safe_channel): wake blocked reserve() on reservation release, not just enqueue

When reservation capacity is saturated, reserve() was waiting on the
not_empty condvar, meaning it only woke when a new item was enqueued.
Now it waits on reservation_released, waking immediately when a prior
reservation commits or drops. Also:
- Assert max_reservations > 0 at construction time
- Notify reservation_released on close() to unblock waiters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
